# Runtime Secret Private Evidence Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/runtimesecretevidence -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`runtime-secret-private-evidence`](runtime-secret-private-evidence.riido.json).

Public workflow: [`.github/workflows/runtime-secret-private-evidence.yml`](../../.github/workflows/runtime-secret-private-evidence.yml).

Private owner: `riido-infra`.

## Public Scope

- `public daemon repo defines metadata-only runtime secret evidence contract`
- `private infra may collect sanitized packet summaries`
- `public repo must never require raw secret values`

## Evidence Kinds

| Kind | Actual ID | Proves | Forbids |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `runtime-secret-readiness` | `actual-runtime-secret-readiness` | secret references exist; payload shape is ready | raw token values; raw authorization payloads |
| `runtime-secret-rotation` | `actual-runtime-secret-rotation` | rotatable flag is true; rotation timestamps are valid | raw secret values; decrypted parameter values |

## Allowed Packet Fields

- `schema_version`
- `id`
- `environment`
- `observed_at`
- `kind`
- `secret_ref`
- `parameter_name_hash`
- `secure_string`
- `tier`
- `last_rotated_at`
- `next_rotation_due_at`
- `max_age_seconds`
- `rotatable`
- `collector_version`
- `source_operation`

## Allowed AWS Operations

- `ssm:DescribeParameters`

## Forbidden AWS Operations

- `ssm:GetParameter`
- `ssm:GetParameters`
- `ssm:GetParametersByPath`
- `kms:Decrypt`
- `secretsmanager:GetSecretValue`

## Forbidden Field Names

- `value`
- `token`
- `secret`
- `secret_string`
- `payload`
- `parameter_value`
- `decrypted_value`
- `authorization`
- `bearer`

## Semantics

- Public CI validates the packet contract without reading private secret values.
- Private infra evidence may satisfy this contract only with metadata fields.
- Any raw secret field or decrypt/read operation is a contract failure.
